title: Ok Zoomer Addon: Spyglass Trinket Slot
description: Intented to be used alongside the Ok Zoomer mod to take advantage of the "require spyglass" option.  It gives a survival aspect to zooming, but saves you an inventory slot!
body:
# ![ok zoomer icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2785164069c27f0e4ac1317cf685bb0bc65ed970.png) Ok Zoomer Addon: Spyglass Trinket Slot ### Intented to be used alongside the [Ok Zoomer](https://modrinth.com/mod/ok-zoomer) mod, this slot lets you take advantage of the "require spyglass" config option. Enabling it introduces a survival aspect to zooming, but with this addon you can save yourself an inventory slot!
This can be used without Ok Zoomer if you just want a spot to put your trusty spyglass! [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) mod is required**
![Spyglass in its slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62dbd296385a7e4cb260be4a393f65cfe764be77.png) ![settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a6d239db7c1327f56797793ffabcad418e24b68.png) ## Demonstration of it functioning in its slot ![working in the slot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cbbgh5gR/images/d574f07a0e521623d3c03fff5b252adbe0cd824e.gif) ### If you want the vignette appearance displayed in the gif above ^^^ enable these settings:
### Located under the "Features" section ![Located under the "Features" section](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e802879a2b086807b109f0892fb961394ef7f453.png) ### Located under the "Tweaks" section ![Located under the "Tweaks" section](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb202f335bb371040703335531a0835e55ee2f9c.png) ![bottom of page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e67e630fae8a5b3de089ccf161cec305399481f.png) :P
